message:
prompt: add adversarial self-review and remove planning escape hatches

- Remove "5 or more steps" gate on task_list — always plan
- Remove "skip the plan for simple tasks" escape hatch
- Add adversarial reviewer stance to subagent verification
- Add explicit rounds-usage language (don't quit before 20)
- Rewrite verification section with hostile reviewer pattern:
  switch roles, re-read spec literally, read actual files,
  compare line-by-line before declaring done

Addresses: adaptive-rejection-sampler (1 tool call, empty result),
gpt2-codegolf (quit at 17/100), and 13 close/partial failures
where agent did 60-90% of the work and stopped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
